seoTitle: Mount Macarthur vs Mount Maria — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Macarthur and Mount Maria. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Macarthur vs Mount Maria: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Macarthur and Mount Maria.
heading: Mount Macarthur vs Mount Maria — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Macarthur, Queensland and Mount Maria, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Maria has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Mount Macarthur (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Macarthur or Mount Maria safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Macarthur has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Mount Maria scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Macarthur scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Maria scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Macarthur or Mount Maria?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Maria has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
